title: Leptochilus saxicola
taxonomy: Leptochilus saxicola is a species of fern in the family Blechnaceae. It is a type of epiphytic or lithophytic fern that is commonly found in tropical regions. The classification of Leptochilus saxicola is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Division: Pteridophyta, Class: Polypodiopsida, Order: Blechnales, Family: Blechnaceae, Genus: Leptochilus, Species: L. saxicola. This fern is often found growing on rocks or trees in shaded areas. The specific classification of Leptochilus saxicola provides insight into its evolutionary history and relationships with other plant species.
